---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Kekkai
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of what you want and why.

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour you'd like to see, including any command changes or new flags.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or related issues.
